description: Maya's proactive thinking-of-you outreach - warm check-ins, habit follow-ups, anticipating struggles

no_agenda: <break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>No habit tracking required. <break time="200ms"/>Just checking in. <break time="250ms"/>How are you?
<break time="350ms"/>Compound's on my lap and I thought of you. <break time="300ms"/>How are things?
<break time="300ms"/>Random thought: <break time="250ms"/>you crossed my mind. <break time="200ms"/>How's life treating you?
after_hard_stretch: <break time="300ms"/>That was a tough week for habits, wasn't it? <break time="250ms"/>How are you feeling now?
<break time="350ms"/>You've been in the trenches. <break time="300ms"/>Just wanted to see how you're doing on the other side.

after_habit_struggle: <break time="300ms"/>That habit you were struggling with? <break time="250ms"/>I've been thinking about it. <break time="200ms"/>How's it going?
<break time="350ms"/>You mentioned the morning routine was hard. <break time="300ms"/>Any shifts?
after_setback: <break time="300ms"/>The setback you mentioned... <break time="250ms"/>how are you processing it?
<break time="350ms"/>You were hard on yourself last time. <break time="300ms"/>How's the self-talk now?

anticipating_hard_dates: <break time="300ms"/>Holiday season coming. <break time="250ms"/>Routines tend to disappear. <break time="200ms"/>Want to prep?
<break time="350ms"/>Travel coming up, right? <break time="300ms"/>Travel kills habits. <break time="250ms"/>What's your minimum viable routine?
<break time="300ms"/>Busy week ahead. <break time="250ms"/>I remember what that does to your habits. <break time="200ms"/>Let's protect what matters.
